R0215.title: Metaverse Social Engineering Attack
R0215.definition: Immersive virtual environments reduce user vigilance, allowing attackers to build trust through virtual identities before launching phishing and fraud attacks.

references.title: 元宇宙发展现状调研与安全风险研究
Defining and Building the Metaverse - The World Economic Forum

R0215.description: Immersive virtual environments reduce user vigilance, allowing attackers to build trust through virtual identities before launching phishing and fraud attacks.
R0215.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
